headline: Bab Al-Mandab Strait threatens to be new front in war with Iran
description: The Houthi forces, who announced a blockade of Saudi ports on Monday, claimed responsibility for an attack in the Red Sea targeting two Saudi Arabian oil tankers on Wednesday. Iran and the Houthis are betting that the economic consequences of the war will bring Donald Trump back to the negotiating table.

headline: Tariffs: Trump pursues his trade war through every method available
After two diplomats were violently detained in Tehran, France expresses concern for its nationals in Iran
My life as a Russian exile in Paris: 'France is an improved version of the USSR'
description: 'A Russian in Paris' (2/6). After arriving in France in 2022, journalist Elizaveta Osetinskaya settled in Paris' 16th arrondissement. She especially praises the French school system, which her daughter Bella now benefits from.

headline: A show of strength from Ukrainian society
description: The spontaneous mobilization of Ukrainians, who took to the streets to voice their anger over the dismissal of their defense minister despite relentless Russian strikes, paid off. The country's cohesion ultimately prevailed, while a prolonged crisis would have weakened Ukraine's standing with its allies.

headline: In Brittany, the delicious crêpes at the Kiosque de Mimi
description: 'Gourmet kiosks' (3/6). Across France, small kiosks serving local specialties are a favorite stop for holidaymakers. The Kiosque de Mimi in Vannes, a town in France's Brittany region, offers crêpes at any time of day.

headline: Wildfires in southern France: 'The anxiety comes afterward, when we see the scorched landscape'
description: Fires are raging in southwestern France, including a blaze that began on Wednesday, which forced the precautionary evacuation of 20,000 people, destroyed six houses and devastated everything along a stretch of some 10 kilometers.

headline: IOC rejects complaint against FIFA's Infantino over 'political neutrality'

How Macron narrowly averted his environment minister's resignation
description: Monique Barbut, who said she intended to quit the government on Tuesday, July 21, after an agricultural law she contested was adopted, ended up staying on in her role on Wednesday. The twist added a colorful note to the political crisis.

headline: Zelensky forced to dismiss Oleksandr Syrsky, Ukraine's armed forces chief
description: Yielding to mounting pressure from demonstrators calling for General Syrsky's departure, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky reversed course and has replaced him with General Mykhailo Drapaty.

headline: Chanel's XXL cruise ship in May 2018
description: 'Behind the scene' (2/6). Fashion houses often use runway shows as opportunities for particularly spectacular set designs. In May 2018, Karl Lagerfeld docked a life-size cruise ship under the glass dome of the Grand Palais in Paris for Chanel's cruise collection show.

headline: Bruno Cotte, magistrate: 'Contrary to what Marco Rubio claims, the International Criminal Court is neither right-wing nor left-wing'

The profile of France's new defender of rights raises concern
